description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 3/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify model/action/request events align with the underlying telemetry
  foundation.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Verified and tightened alignment with the underlying telemetry foundation. The collector now ingests request rejected events and Jido action executor events, lifts nested jido correlation metadata, and maps action/request statuses into the local trace projection. Added regression coverage using Jido.AI.Observe request/model emitters plus [:jido, :action, ...] telemetry to prove request, model, and action events join into one trace. Verified with format, compile, full tests, docs warnings-as-errors, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Verify model/action/request events align with the underlying telemetry foundation
